commands: read DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME DB_USER DB_PASS <<< "$(docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "python -c 'import json; p=\"/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend/site_config.json\"; c=\"/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/common_site_config.json\"; s=json.load(open(p)); m=json.load(open(c)); s[\"db_host\"]=m[\"db_host\"]; s[\"db_port\"]=int(m.get(\"db_port\",3306)); s[\"db_type\"]=\"mariadb\"; s[\"db_password\"]=\"FrontDbPass2026!\"; open(p,\"w\").write(json.dumps(s,indent=1)+\"\\n\"); print(s[\"db_host\"], s[\"db_port\"], s[\"db_name\"], s[\"db_user\"], s[\"db_password\"])'" )"

docker exec -e DB_HOST="$DB_HOST" -e DB_PORT="$DB_PORT" -e DB_NAME="$DB_NAME" -e DB_USER="$DB_USER" -e DB_PASS="$DB_PASS" frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "mysql -h '$DB_HOST' -P '$DB_PORT' -u erpnext -p'AtlasLakesAws123!' -e \"CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS $DB_NAME CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\""

docker exec -e DB_HOST="$DB_HOST" -e DB_PORT="$DB_PORT" -e DB_NAME="$DB_NAME" -e DB_USER="$DB_USER" -e DB_PASS="$DB_PASS" frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "mysql -h '$DB_HOST' -P '$DB_PORT' -u erpnext -p'AtlasLakesAws123!' -e \"CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS '$DB_USER'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS'; ALTER USER '$DB_USER'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON $DB_NAME.* TO '$DB_USER'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;\""
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site frontend migrate'
